response.justification: Bogdan brings genuine staff-level seniority, strong TypeScript depth, and directly relevant MCP server and agentic-workflow experience at his current role—but the role demands 8+ years of production AI delivery, and his GenAI work begins only in April 2025. Python, the de-facto language for AI/ML tooling, is entirely absent from his skills list. There is no mention of vector databases, RAG architectures, or named multi-agent frameworks such as LangGraph or CrewAI. His high-scale data-pipeline work at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic and AWS CDK experience at Optilyz partially address cloud and data-infrastructure requirements, but the AI-specific depth the role requires is not yet demonstrated at the level needed for a staff forward-deployed position.
strengths: Hands-on MCP (Model Context Protocol) server and agentic-workflow development at current role directly matches a listed key technology
High-scale data-integration and micro-services experience at Dunnhumby handling millions of HTTP requests per second demonstrates production data-pipeline credibility
Consistent staff-level seniority across multiple companies with evidence of technical mentorship, workshops, and cross-functional delivery
concerns: Python is entirely absent from the skills list—a critical gap for production GenAI engineering where the ecosystem is Python-dominant
AI/GenAI experience is limited to the current role starting April 2025, falling years short of the 8-year production AI requirement
No mention of vector databases, RAG architectures, LLM evaluation pipelines, or observability frameworks for AI systems
